storyInfo: Ksenia takes the Doctor and Mon3tr to the mines to obtain a sample of 'Oka'. The fugitive miners abandon their vehicle after it runs out of power. Rankin seeks help from a nearby village and gets it, but they do not realize the impending danger.

attributes.content: <p=1>Central Far North Mining District, Ursus</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: Huh? Oh... uh, no.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: I just...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.options: If you have reservations...;We can look for it ourselves.

attributes.content: (Shakes head)
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: I chose to be your guide. Besides, I want to know the truth about Oka too.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Worst case scenario, I guess they exile me...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: The path ahead seems to be safe, Doctor. I do not detect any lifeforms—
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Huh?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Ksenia glances at Mon3tr, then quickly and awkwardly looks away.
You notice the researcher has been following Mon3tr quietly, looking to her from time to time. Even Mon3tr has noticed it now.
You keep glancing at me, Ksenia... do I look weird?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: What? No, no!
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: It's just, seeing you brings back memories.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: What memories?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: You see... the problem is that I don't remember them clearly.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: It's so distant that it's become faded and indistinct, like ink on a piece of paper that's been submerged in water...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: But... may I ask you a couple of questions?
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Of course! I only hope I can answer them.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: You said your name is Mon3tr?
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Yes, that's what they call me.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Mon3tr... Mon3tr.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: She chews on the unfamiliar name.
Mon3tr, do you—
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Do you feel cold...?
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Huh?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Wh-What I mean is, you're quite lightly dressed.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: I can give you my jacket, if you need it. It'll at least keep the wind off you before we enter the mines.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: I guess it might be a little too old—
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: I-I get it! There's no need!
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: It took me a little while to process it because you're the first one to ask me this question. But no, I'm really not cold!
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: No, I'm not cold. But thank you for the offer!
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Were you about to say something, Doctor?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Ah... alright.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Perhaps your constitution is strong, and the cold doesn't bother you.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Yes! I'm strong!
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: It's alright, Ksenia. You can trust us.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: We'll be walking together for a while. Feel free to ask any questions.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Right...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: You said you were colleagues of Director Kal'tsit...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Is... is Director Kal'tsit well?
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Um...
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: I... I wouldn't say that.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: I was Professor Ilia's assistant. I didn't have much interaction with Director Kal'tsit personally.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: All I remember is a few...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Ksenia! Ksenia!
attributes.name: Ilia

attributes.content: Y-Yes, Professor!
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Why isn't the experiment data from this morning on my desk?
attributes.name: Ilia

attributes.content: I'm sorry! I'll go get it right now!
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: How many times do I have to tell you? You need to be able to keep up with the pacing, if you want to be part of the project. If all I wanted was someone to copy instrument readings onto paper, my three-year-old daughter could do it.
attributes.name: Ilia

attributes.content: And what are these scribbles? Energy conversion equations?
attributes.name: Ilia

attributes.content: Do your job first, Ksenia, before you try anything new.
attributes.name: Ilia

attributes.content: What is this?
attributes.name: Kal'tsit

attributes.content: D-Director Kal'tsit. It's nothing, nothing to waste your time on.
attributes.name: Ilia

attributes.content: Ksenia is still young. It'll take time for her to get used to working on an active project. I'll take responsibility for any mistakes...
attributes.name: Ilia

attributes.content: Did you come up with this equation yourself?
attributes.name: Kal'tsit

attributes.content: Yes...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: The theoretical model is quite creative, and the simulation model is sound. The equation would form the basis of highly efficient power supplies, if it can be successfully established.
attributes.name: Kal'tsit

attributes.content: Kinetic energy loss has not been taken into account, however, and more validation of the data is necessary.
attributes.name: Kal'tsit

attributes.content: Good grief...
attributes.name: Ilia

attributes.content: I... I'm sorry, Director Kal'tsit.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: There's no need to apologize. You took initiative, you wanted to be a part of what's going on.
attributes.name: Kal'tsit

attributes.content: You can listen in on the next report session, if you want.
attributes.name: Kal'tsit

attributes.content: R-Really?
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: And don't be so hard on her, Ilia. One should encourage the enthusiasm of youth appropriately.
attributes.name: Kal'tsit

attributes.content: You made worse mistakes when you were her age.
attributes.name: Kal'tsit

attributes.content: You're right. I understand.
attributes.name: Ilia

attributes.content: Th-Thank you...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: It's true that Director Kal'tsit inspired me at one point.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Like many who were there, I had hoped that research into the Sarcophagus would yield a new form of clean energy that could benefit everyone.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: That way, miners would be liberated from the dangers of the mines, and the lives of the Infected would no longer be needed to fuel this monstrosity by the name of Ursus.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: I was young, naive... it never occurred to me that a country's character, like the character of a person, is not so easily shaken or changed.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Regardless, I was very happy I got to hear Director Kal'tsit's name after the accident.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: I thought, maybe I would have a chance to...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: See her again?
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Sorry! Forget I ever said anything. I assume it's something you may not answer.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: I just thought... you look like you might know the Director. Perhaps you knew her, knew where she went, and if she's doing well.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: But I suppose it was never my place to know...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Ksenia.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Yes?
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: You'll see Kal'tsit again. I promise.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Oh, so you mean she is still...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: I am delighted to hear that.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: We'll see Kal'tsit again, won't we, Doctor?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: I look forward to it...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Should I get the chance, I would like to go to this 'Rhodes Island' that Director Kal'tsit founded, and which Serafina has mentioned...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: One moment... something's not right...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: We didn't see anyone on the way, did we?
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: No miners, and even though we're very near the mine shafts, we haven't seen a single guard, a single Patrol Unit.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.options: The Grand Duchess put the entire mining district on lockdown.;Was everyone transferred?

attributes.content: I know about the lockdown. But the transfer—
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: No... What I know is completely different.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: I thought the only problem was the failure of the Oka experiments. I never heard anything about the mining district being cleaned up.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.options: We've hardly encountered any resistance since we entered the district.;The defenses are even sparser than inside Bresk.
The missing miners...;Where did they go?

attributes.content: <p=1>Far North Tundra, Ursus</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: Rankin puts the finishing touches by carving on the door of the carriage, then throws away the rock.
I know how to draw the symbol now. I'll help next time.
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: Sure. You can do it next time.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: I'm done over here. Have we gotten the stuff out of the other containers?
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Pavel's side is done. The last two containers didn't have much in the way of useful supplies. Should we remove the mechanical components and take them with us?
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: You said you used to work in the machine factories in the city?
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: Take a few parts that can be used on other machines. Maybe we can sell them for money.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Assuming anyone would buy them...
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: We must also take the injured into account.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Gospozha Serafina.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: We have too many injured. It's not realistic to immediately continue the journey on foot.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: We need rest.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Rankin! We took inventory and we should have enough food to last two or three days if we ration it. It should last us until the next village.
attributes.name: Excited Miner

attributes.content: I thought there would be more... but I suppose we should be glad to have what we have.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Vetochki found some nuts stockpiled by musbeasts. It'll sate the hunger for a while, and it doesn't spoil easily.
attributes.name: Excited Miner

attributes.content: Right now, we need medical supplies more than we need food—
attributes.name: Excited Miner

attributes.content: Where do we find it?
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: Only way is the nomadic cities, or a mobile medical post. If we can contact one...
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Rankin looks towards Raidian.
I can attempt to contact a nearby mobile medical post.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Thank you, Gospozha Serafina.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Don't thank me so soon. I have a condition.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: We appreciate what you and your team have done for us, but in our current circumstances—
attributes.name: Excited Miner

attributes.content: The injured must stay put while I attempt to contact the mobile medical posts.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: It's my judgment as a medical professional that they need rest.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: The kind of rest that isn't bumpy.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Who are you taking?
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: Lidiya, Pavel, and a few sweet talkers who could coax coins out of their supervisors.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: You didn't like those slick talkers from the ore-washing plant.
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: It has nothing to do with my preferences.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Why not me? Because I might argue with you?
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: We're seeking help from a nearby village, not soliciting donations from a noble banquet in Grypherburg, barin. Your way won't work with farmers who can't even write their own name.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Call me that again, and I'll break your nose.
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: You'll break your knuckles on it.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: You don't think seeking help from the village is a good idea.
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: ...Right.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Until Gospozha Serafina makes contact with a mobile medical post, however, we can't sit around doing nothing.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: We're not injured.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: We've sat around doing nothing. We sang and danced—you played the accordion!
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: All past tense. Our supplies will run out soon. I must do what I can before that happens.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: While we're gone... I need you to stay here and take care of those staying behind.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: I doubt the villagers would be charitable this time.
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: Of course. Few people are glad to open their door and see an Infected standing in it. We've already learned that.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: How long has Rankin been in there? Should we check it out?
attributes.name: Excited Miner

attributes.content: Calm down. Rankin told us to wait.
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: But last time—
attributes.name: Excited Miner

attributes.content: Come out, Vetochki. I know you were following us. Rankin must have known, too. He just chose not to say anything.
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: Why didn't you stay behind with Nikto and the others? You need to take care of your babushka, don't you?
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: Babushka said, it's alright...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: I wanted to, help. So I, came. I can, h-help!
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Did Nikto know that you came with us? He might have thought that you went missing.
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: I left, a... note.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: That works. You know, I thought you could be useful with us, but Rankin wouldn't have it.
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: Wh-Where has, uchitel, gone?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: He's going to negotiate with them, see if we can get some food.
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: Wh-What do we, have to t-trade?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Parts from the vehicles.
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: But he went over empty-handed!
attributes.name: Excited Miner

attributes.content: Maybe he wanted to show that he means no harm. People might get the wrong idea if he was holding a weapon or a chunk of metal.
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: But he didn't take anything the last time either, and those people stalled for time while they sneaked someone out to call for the Patrol Units—
attributes.name: Excited Miner

attributes.content: I have to help him!
attributes.name: Excited Miner

attributes.content: Pavel!
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: Chyort... wait up!
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: (Hushed) Stop it!
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: Rankin is inside—
attributes.name: Excited Miner

attributes.content: The miner covers her colleague's mouth with her hand and pulls him to one side.
They can hear the indistinct sound of talking coming from inside the house.
...Understood...
attributes.name: Voice from Inside

attributes.content: (Sound of metal grinding)
attributes.name: Voice from Inside

attributes.content: ...We've... informed...
attributes.name: Voice from Inside

attributes.content: (Sound of impact)
attributes.name: Voice from Inside

attributes.content: (Whisper) Something doesn't sound right.
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: Mmmpppphhh—
attributes.name: Excited Miner

attributes.content: (Whisper) Promise you won't just kick down the door, and I'll let go.
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: (Nods)
attributes.name: Excited Miner

attributes.content: As soon as he can breathe again, the miner points towards the back door of the house.
There, clear as day on the snow, is a row of footprints leading away from the house.
(Whisper) ...Govno.
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: (Whisper) One of you, go knock on the door. Act anxious and spin a story when they answer the door.
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: (Whisper) Why don't YOU go? If they've got Rankin, whoever knocks on the door is next, isn't it?
attributes.name: Slick Miner

attributes.content: (Whisper) I-I'll go.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: (Whisper) No, Vetochki—
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: Vetochki taps lightly on the door with her knuckles.
The sound from inside ceases.
Who's there?
attributes.name: Voice from Inside

attributes.content: (Whisper) ...Keep knocking.
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: (Knocks)
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Back so soon...
attributes.name: Voice from Inside

attributes.content: Argh!
attributes.name: Villager

attributes.content: What's going on—
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Sir!
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Are you alright, Rankin?
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: Lidiya? I thought I told you to wait outside—
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: ...Vetochki?
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: What are you doing here?
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: So you're all miners who came out under orders to find supplies.
attributes.name: Friendly Villager

attributes.content: Yes, sir! I must apologize for what that fool did. He spends so much time underground that he's forgotten how to tell a good person from a bad one.
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: I'm sorry, I'm so sorry. We had a bad experience when we tried to seek help from another village, and I thought this would be the same—
attributes.name: Excited Miner

attributes.content: Pavel.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: You're honest about things. I have a fair idea how people from other villages treat the Infected... most of Ursus is like that.
attributes.name: Friendly Villager

attributes.content: But you're not those Infected that don't care about authority and just want to cause trouble. You're miners, right?
attributes.name: Friendly Villager

attributes.content: Yes! You know, of course, that we can't leave the mining district without permission from up high.
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: This is our foreman right here. They told him not to go back until he's found supplies.
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: Would the bosses leave you to starve if you don't find it?
attributes.name: Friendly Villager

attributes.content: Yes. It's not so bad for adults like us, but kids like Vetochki over here, how are they supposed to grow without eating?
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: Vetochki? This girl? She's a miner too?
attributes.name: Friendly Villager

attributes.content: How old are you...?
attributes.name: Friendly Villager

attributes.content: I-I'm—
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Let me guess. Ten?
attributes.name: Friendly Villager

attributes.content: Fifteen.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Haha. You're shy, like my daughter... she might have a child your age now, if she's still alive.
attributes.name: Friendly Villager

attributes.content: She went to the mines after she got the Stone Disease. Not around these parts, to the east, the Northern Tundra? It's further away, anyhow.
attributes.name: Friendly Villager

attributes.content: Th-The mines, are good. D-Don't worry... dedushka.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Dedushka... grandpa, huh...?
attributes.name: Friendly Villager

attributes.content: I don't even know how and when she got sick. She wouldn't say. I haven't heard from her for a long time.
attributes.name: Friendly Villager

attributes.content: Let's not talk about that! Sounds like you have people running your mining district. Some places don't care about their miners at all, giving them nothing to eat, and they don't give them any other way out either.
attributes.name: Friendly Villager

attributes.content: I heard some miners got so desperate they ran away. They'd rather risk the Patrol Units.
attributes.name: Friendly Villager

attributes.content: Can you help us?
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: My wife went out to discuss things with the others before you came in.
attributes.name: Friendly Villager

attributes.content: So those footprints were...
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: You have the parts, Lidiya?
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Right here.
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: Rankin takes the cloth package and gives it to the old man.
Here, you should be able to replace the aging parts on your harvester with it.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: In exchange for the food you shared with us.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Sure, sure... honestly, I don't know anything about harvesters other than that it's been broken for a while. Do you mind helping me fit the part on if you want to help?
attributes.name: Friendly Villager

attributes.content: I'll take a look. I used to work in a machine factory.
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: That's great.
attributes.name: Friendly Villager

attributes.content: You really managed to get food. A fair bit of it, too.
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: Gennady says it was a good year for crops, but his harvester was broken. They managed to harvest the mossoat by hand, only to have surplus grain sitting around in granaries because the caravans didn't come this year.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Life is hard for everyone without cash. Still, they were willing to barter with us, rather than waiting until spring to sell.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Lidiya said those parts are worth more than mossoat.
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: As far as we're concerned, food is priceless.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Must you go so soon?
attributes.name: Friendly Villager

attributes.content: Yes. We've accomplished our mission. It's time to go back.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: I had hoped that you would fill your bellies before you go.
attributes.name: Friendly Villager

attributes.content: If you want, there are a few houses on the west end of the village that have been empty since the previous inhabitants left. Your group can take shelter there, make a fire, get warm and make some food.
attributes.name: Friendly Villager

attributes.content: Spasibo...
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: I can't tell you how grateful I am.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: There's no need. The girl helped us repair the harvester for next year. We're the ones who should thank you.
attributes.name: Friendly Villager

attributes.content: Besides, it's not like we did much.
attributes.name: Friendly Villager

attributes.content: Normally, we don't touch the collective food stores for winter. Patrol Units are less frequent these days, but it's a chore when the tax collectors come around.
attributes.name: Friendly Villager

attributes.content: All we old folks did was to take a little grain out of our own reserves, so that you can go back and say you've done your job.
attributes.name: Friendly Villager

attributes.content: Not like there's anything else we can help with—
attributes.name: Friendly Villager

attributes.content: Maybe you can tell us your daughter's name. We can try to ask when we—uh, return to the mining district.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Oh, she's not here in the Far North! She's in the Northern Tundra, far to the east...
attributes.name: Friendly Villager

attributes.content: Just tell me.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Well, I suppose it can do no harm.
attributes.name: Friendly Villager

attributes.content: Her name is Milana...
attributes.name: Friendly Villager

attributes.content: A pair of blank, soulless eyes gaze out from the darkness.
The cracking of the bonfire hides his indistinct mutter.
Achieve...
attributes.name: Hawley

attributes.content: Salvation.
attributes.name: Hawley
